evals.name: Red Hat Skills Installer
evals.prompt: You are setting up Red Hat agent skills for a new project. Describe the installation process: what skills are included in the pack, how each skill is installed, what happens if a download fails, and what the user should do after installation completes.
evals.expected_output: A bootstrap installer workflow that downloads 5 Red Hat skills (cve-explainer, diagnostics, product-lifecycle, security-mcp-setup, support-severity) from the agentic-collections repository, handles failures gracefully, and provides a post-install summary with available commands.
assertions: The output lists the 5 Red Hat skills to install: red-hat-cve-explainer, red-hat-diagnostics, red-hat-product-lifecycle, red-hat-security-mcp-setup, and red-hat-support-severity.
The output describes continuing installation even if a single skill download fails, reporting failures at the end for manual recovery.
The output describes a post-install summary listing available slash commands for each installed skill.
The output recommends running /red-hat-security-mcp-setup after installation to configure the Security MCP server.
